---
title: Start Here! - Sample Document
subtitle: An example of each type of problem
author: Guenther, Benjamin A.
project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs
format: 
  revealjs:
    incremental: false
    html-math-method: mathjax
    self-contained-math: false
    embed-resources: false
    smaller: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import importlib
import stats_project 
import random

# This is to clear cache and reload after edits to the .py file
importlib.reload(stats_project)
from stats_project import RandomData, FactorialData
```

## Hypothesis Testing with *z*-scores {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 1, n = sample_size).z_test()
```

## One-Sample *t*-test {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 1, n = sample_size).one_sample_t_test()
```

## Independent-Samples *t*-test {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 2, n = sample_size).independent_samples_t_test()
```

## Dependent-Samples *t*-test {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 2, n = sample_size).dependent_samples_t_test()
```

## One-Way ANOVA {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
n_groups = random.randint(3,5)
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = n_groups, n = sample_size).anova(test = "one-way")
```

## Repeated-Measures ANOVA {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
n_groups = random.randint(3,5)
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = n_groups, n = sample_size).anova(test = "repeated-measures")
```

## Two-Factor ANOVA {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3)
levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3)
n = random.randint(5,15)
FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA()
```
